'''hajumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readahead|readahead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readahead|readahead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hajumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjimith|hæjimith]] || [[word:hæjimij|hæjimij]] || [[word:hæjimish|hæjimish]] || [[word:hæjimi|hæjimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajujumuth|hajujumuth]] || [[word:hajujumuj|hajujumuj]] || [[word:hajujumush|hajujumush]] || [[word:hajujumu|hajujumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajumuth|hajumuth]] || [[word:hajumuj|hajumuj]] || [[word:hajumush|hajumush]] || [[word:hajumu|hajumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajufmuth|hajufmuth]] || [[word:hajufmuj|hajufmuj]] || [[word:hajufmush|hajufmush]] || [[word:hajufmuf|hajufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajumuthu|hajumuthu]] || [[word:hajumuju|hajumuju]] || [[word:hajumushu|hajumushu]] || [[word:hajumuku|hajumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajumuth|hajumuth]] || [[word:hajumuj|hajumuj]] || [[word:hajumush|hajumush]] || [[word:hajumu|hajumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajumuthul|hajumuthul]] || [[word:hajumujul|hajumujul]] || [[word:hajumushul|hajumushul]] || [[word:hajumukul|hajumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajumuthuthu|hajumuthuthu]] || [[word:hajumujuju|hajumujuju]] || [[word:hajumushushu|hajumushushu]] || [[word:hajumuku|hajumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajumuthun|hajumuthun]] || [[word:hajumujun|hajumujun]] || [[word:hajumushun|hajumushun]] || [[word:hajumukun|hajumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajumuthuoro|hajumuthuoro]] || [[word:hajumujuoro|hajumujuoro]] || [[word:hajumushuoro|hajumushuoro]] || [[word:hajumukuoro|hajumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
